_comment: Pinned upstreams for the Theettam peridot kernel. scripts/ci/check-upstreams.py compares these against the real upstreams and reports drift. Bumping a pin here does NOT rebuild anything by itself — the build workflow carries its own pins, and they are meant to be updated together in a reviewed commit.

ack.name: Android Common Kernel (android14-6.1-lts)
ack.note: A new LTS tag needs a real 3-way merge with hand-resolved conflicts. Never auto-merge to a release.

guidixx.name: GuidixX/kernel_xiaomi_sm8635 (16.2) — device base
guidixx.note: The device base this fork is built on. New commits here are peridot hardware fixes (charging, display, camera) and boot-safety reverts. Merge them rather than cherry-picking: the revert set is why this kernel boots at all.

susfs.name: susfs4ksu (gki-android14-6.1)
susfs.note: v2.2.0. The hand-port grafts susfs's CMD dispatch into the driver's reboot kprobe; a susfs bump can move the anchors, so integrate.sh may need work.
